name: rami
description: AI code review for Claude Code and Codex. Reviews every PR, fixes issues via MCP, you decide what merges.

interface.shortDescription: AI code review for Claude Code and Codex
interface.longDescription: AI code review for Claude Code and Codex. Rami reviews every PR for security, bugs, and performance, then fixes the findings through MCP — or accepts your dispute when the finding is wrong. Trigger reviews with /rami:review, check status with /rami:review-status, and manage usage with /rami:usage.
